active_ingredients.name: Dinotefuran
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Systemic neonicotinoid that disrupts insect nervous system causing paralysis and death

active_ingredients.name: Pymetrozine
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Feeding blocker that stops sap sucking insects from feeding leading to starvation

mode_of_action_summary: Dual action insecticide providing quick knockdown through nervous system disruption and long-lasting control by stopping insect feeding.

application_details.coverage_requirement: Thorough coverage especially on underside of leaves

crop_stage_recommendation: At first appearance of sucking pests
tank_mix_compatibility: Compatible with most commonly used insecticides and fungicides (jar test recommended)

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Rotate with insecticides of different mode of action to prevent resistance

safety.first_aid: In case of skin or eye contact wash immediately with clean water. If inhaled move to fresh air.

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

farmer_benefits: Reduces virus transmission by whitefly and aphids
Protects new plant growth due to systemic action

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we spray Rippet?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Spray at the early stage of pest attack.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does it kill whitefly and jassid?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it is highly effective against all sucking pests.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is it systemic?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it has systemic and contact action.

frequently_asked_questions.question: After how many days should we repeat spray?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Repeat after 10 to 14 days if pest pressure remains.

llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, highlight dual action, early spray timing, coverage of underside leaves and resistance rotation advice.

master_descriptions.english: Rippet (Dinotefuran + Pymetrozine WG) is a dual action systemic insecticide that provides rapid knockdown of sucking pests and long-lasting control by stopping their feeding.
master_descriptions.urdu: رپٹ ڈائنوٹیفیوران اور پائمیٹروزین پر مشتمل ایک دوہری اثر والی سسٹمک حشرہ کش دوا ہے جو چوسنے والے کیڑوں کو فوری کنٹرول کرتی ہے اور ان کی خوراک بند کر دیتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: رپٹ ڈائنوٹیفیوران تے پائمیٹروزین والی اک سسٹمک حشرہ کش اے جو چوسن والے کیڑیاں نوں فوری مار دیندی اے تے اوہناں دی خوراک بند کر کے لمبا کنٹرول دیندی اے۔
